title: Region
description: A large zone of the city (Downtown, Residential, ...) with its own independent threat/loot/density clock (GDD IV, VII). Static definition only — live 0-100 state lives in GameState.regions, seeded from `baseline`.

$schema.description: Optional editor hint pointing at this schema.

id.description: Stable content id, e.g. "region.downtown". Referenced by id from GameState (never embedded).

name.description: Player-facing display name (ICU MessageFormat string, LOCALIZATION §13).

baseline.description: Initial 0-100 integer state used to seed GameState.regions[id] at run start.

adjacent.description: Region ids reachable from this one.

notes.description: Author commentary. JSON has no comments (ADR-0002); use this field.
